lsm9ds1_read_gyro.tooltip: Read gyroscope data (results stored in gx/gy/gz)

lsm9ds1_read_accel.tooltip: Read accelerometer data (results stored in ax/ay/az)

lsm9ds1_read_mag.tooltip: Read magnetometer data (results stored in mx/my/mz)

lsm9ds1_get_gyro_axis.tooltip: Return gyroscope value for specified axis (unit: dps, call 'read gyroscope' first)

lsm9ds1_get_accel_axis.tooltip: Return accelerometer value for specified axis (unit: g, call 'read accelerometer' first)

lsm9ds1_get_mag_axis.tooltip: Return magnetometer value for specified axis (unit: Gauss, call 'read magnetometer' first)
